name: Arctic Fox
ability: Each night, you gain an alive neighbor's (you don't know which) ability, until dusk.
flavor: Must your claws climb ten-thousand walls? You have come a very long way, sweet thing, but you do not belong here; you will not survive the week. I don't think they can climb ten-thousand more. (v1.6)
firstNightReminder: The Arctic Fox might change ability. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Arctic Fox might change ability. :reminder:

jinxes.reason: An Arctic Fox with the Spy's ability doesn't see the grimoire.
An Arctic Fox with the Widow's ability doesn't see the grimoire.
An Arctic Fox with the Worm's ability doesn't see the grimoire.
